name: Yue Chinese
register: Reverent contemporary colloquial Cantonese (廣東話 book-language) as in the Hong Kong Bible Society's 新廣東話聖經 (New Cantonese Bible), using genuine Cantonese grammar (嘅、哋、係、佢) while carrying the dignified worship cadence of the 和合本 (Chinese Union Version) that Cantonese congregations read aloud. Warm and personal, not stiff or academic.
quote_convention: 「…」 for primary speech, nested 『…』 (full-width corner brackets); horizontal setting.
poetry_convention: Hebrew parallelism preserved as unrhymed couplets — each colon on its own line, second and following cola indented from the prose margin; no metre or end-rhyme.

glossary.note: Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Mt 6:9) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "我哋嘅天父". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)

Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Mt 6:9 / Rom 1:7) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "我哋嘅阿爸父". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)

Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Jn 14:9ff) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "阿爸父". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)
The treasured prayer word every Cantonese believer knows; filial (contains 父), never the generic 神.

Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Rom 8:15 / Mk 14:36) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "阿爸,父". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)
NON-filial contrast term. HK Protestant standard (神版 CUV); 上帝 in the 上帝版 edition. Reversion token — use ONLY where English keeps 'God' as God-as-God.
NON-filial covenant name (CUV standard); Catholic 上主/雅威. Reversion token only. Generic 'Lord' for Jesus = 主, distinct.
Standard Protestant term.

Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Mt 10:20) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "我哋阿爸父嘅靈". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)
Universal Chinese-Bible christological title.
The divine Son relative to 阿爸父; reviewer may prefer the warmer 愛子 (beloved Son) to match the family register.
Traditional title (神的兒子). Reviewer to confirm vs the filial 天父嘅兒子 (the Heavenly Father's Son).
John 3:16. Classic CUV 獨生子 (only-begotten Son) available if the reviewer prefers the treasured wording.

Anchored to 和合本 / 新廣東話聖經 (Mt 26:29) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "我哋阿爸父嘅國". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)
Standard.
Standard.
Protestant transliteration; Catholic 默西亞.
Standard Bible term (新約 New Covenant); 盟約 when a fuller standalone noun is needed.
CUV's treasured rendering of Hebrew hesed; reviewer to confirm vs 堅定嘅愛.
Renders racham / splanchnizomai; CUV uses 動了慈心 for the verb, 憐憫 for the gut-level tender mercy.
The treasured single-character term; 公義 when the sense is 'justice'.
John 3:16 standard.
John 3:3,7 standard; 重新出生 for the plain 'born a second time' sense.
